claim: drop_seed_objects can rebuild a page0 slice containing the built-in text, button, number, image, and timer controls, producing a valid TFT checksum with the local seed/baseline path.
not_claimed: No new COM36 upload, serial readback, camera proof, or timer runtime scheduling proof is claimed by this file.
The image object reuses existing seed picture id 0; this file does not claim new picture-resource packing.
The timer event bytecode is checked offline; this file does not claim boot/page-load timer autorun.
